text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text: What are your favorite okonomiyaki fillings?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
I'd say mine are... shrimp, squid, scallops... You
know, the one with everything—the "special"!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
It's so extravagant with all that stuff in it! Just
thinking about it makes you the happiest, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Some of my friends think I'm just simple to
please... But it's good, isn't it? And so
extravagant...
